title: MarketPrice
description: Competitive market pricing snapshot for a given property profile and target night. Published by the market-ingestor to Kinesis. Used by Flink to provide the market reference input for the pricing engine.

event_id.description: Idempotency key. The Flink consumer uses this to deduplicate on reprocessing.

market_area.description: Market reference area. The Flink join matches apartments to market events by city + neighborhood when available.

neighborhood.description: Sub-city area for more precise comparisons (e.g. Eixample, Gràcia, Malasaña).

property_profile.description: Attributes used to filter comparable properties. Only apartments matching the same profile are included in the market sample.

target_date.description: The specific night these market prices apply to (check-in date). Market prices are highly date-sensitive — do not reuse this event for other dates.

pricing.description: Nightly rate distribution across comparable listings for target_date.

avg_nightly_rate.description: Mean nightly rate of the sample.

p25.description: 25th percentile — the budget end of the market.

p50.description: Median — most representative single market price.

p75.description: 75th percentile — the premium end of the market.

market_context.description: Metadata about the market sample. Used to assess data quality before trusting the price signal.

occupancy_rate.description: Fraction of sampled listings already booked for target_date. High occupancy = high demand = pricing power. Low occupancy = oversupply = pressure to discount.

sample_size.description: Number of comparable listings included. Samples below 10 should be flagged as low-confidence.

data_source.description: Origin of the market data. The pricing engine may apply a confidence weight by source.

platform.description: Which OTA the sample was drawn from. Null when data_source=inside_airbnb (aggregated).

collected_at.description: When the market-ingestor collected this data. Used by Flink watermarking.
